info.title: Tsushin Public API v1
info.description: Public API v1 only. Use this schema for SDK generation.

post.description:
Exchange API client credentials for a short-lived JWT access token.

Accepts the `client_credentials` grant type only. Returns a bearer token
valid for 1 hour. Rate limited to 10 requests per minute per IP address.

401.description: Invalid client credentials

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (10 requests/minute per IP)

get.description:
List agents with pagination and filtering.

Returns a paginated list of agents belonging to the caller's tenant.
Supports filtering by active status, name search, and enabled channel.
Requires `agents.read` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

post.description:
Create a new agent with auto-generated Contact record.

Accepts agent configuration including name, model provider, system prompt,
skills, and sandboxed tools. Requires `agents.write` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

422.description: Validation error — invalid request body or query parameters

get.description:
Get detailed agent configuration.

Returns the full agent configuration including system prompt, skills,
sandboxed tools, memory settings, and channel configuration.
Requires `agents.read` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

put.description:
Update agent configuration (partial update).

Only provided fields are updated; omitted fields remain unchanged.
Requires `agents.write` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

422.description: Validation error — invalid request body or query parameters

delete.description:
Delete an agent permanently.

Cannot delete the last remaining agent for a tenant. If the deleted agent
is the default, another agent is automatically promoted. Requires `agents.delete` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

post.description:
Assign skills to an agent.

Adds the specified skill types to the agent. Use `replace: true` to replace
all existing skills. Requires `agents.write` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

delete.description:
Remove a skill from an agent.

Deletes the specified skill type assignment. Returns 404 if the skill is not
assigned to this agent. Requires `agents.write` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

put.description:
Assign or clear a persona on an agent.

Set `persona_id` to assign a persona, or `null` to clear.
Validates tenant ownership of the persona. Requires `agents.write` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

post.description:
Send a message to an agent and get a response.

Supports three modes:
- **Sync** (default): Processes the message and returns the full response.
- **Async** (`?async=true`): Enqueues the message and returns a queue ID for polling via `GET /api/v1/queue/{id}`.
- **Stream** (`?stream=true`): Returns an SSE stream with token-by-token response chunks.

Requires `agents.execute` permission.

202.description: Async mode — message queued for processing

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
Poll the status of a queued chat message.

Returns the queue item status (`pending`, `processing`, `completed`, or `error`)
along with queue position and the result when completed.
Requires `agents.execute` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List conversation threads for an agent.

Returns threads ordered by most recently updated. Requires `agents.read` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
Get messages from a conversation thread.

Returns messages with role, content, and timestamp. Supports ascending
or descending sort order. Requires `agents.read` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

delete.description:
Delete a conversation thread and its messages.

Permanently removes the thread and all associated messages.
Requires `agents.write` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List available skill types in the system.

Returns metadata about each registered skill type including display name,
description, and category. Requires `agents.read` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List sandboxed tools available in the tenant.

Returns enabled tools with their commands and parameters.
Requires `agents.read` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List available personas (tenant-specific and system).

Returns active personas visible to the caller's tenant, including system
personas shared across all tenants. Requires `agents.read` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List available Sentinel security profiles.

Returns profiles visible to the caller's tenant, including system profiles.
Requires `org.settings.read` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List available tone presets.

Returns tone presets visible to the caller's tenant, including system presets.
Requires `agents.read` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List flow definitions with pagination and filtering.

Returns a paginated list of flow definitions belonging to the caller's tenant.
Supports filtering by active status, flow type, and execution method.
Requires **flows.read** permission.

parameters.name: flow_type

schema.description: Filter by flow type: notification, conversation, workflow, task
schema.title: Flow Type

parameters.description: Filter by flow type: notification, conversation, workflow, task

parameters.name: execution_method

schema.description: Filter by execution method: immediate, scheduled, recurring
schema.title: Execution Method

parameters.description: Filter by execution method: immediate, scheduled, recurring

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

post.description:
Create a new flow definition.

Creates a flow in the caller's tenant with the given name and configuration.
The flow defaults to active status; steps must be added separately via POST /flows/{id}/steps.
Requires **flows.write** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

422.description: Validation error — invalid request body or query parameters

get.description:
List flow runs with pagination and optional filtering.

Returns flow execution runs for the caller's tenant, ordered by most recent first.
Filterable by run status and flow definition ID.
Requires **flows.read** permission.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by run status: pending, running, completed, failed, cancelled
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by run status: pending, running, completed, failed, cancelled

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
Get detailed information about a specific flow run.

Returns the flow run with all associated step-level results for monitoring
execution progress. Returns 404 if the run does not exist or belongs to another tenant.
Requires **flows.read** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

post.description:
Cancel a running or pending flow execution.

Sets the run status to 'cancelled' and marks all incomplete step runs as cancelled.
Only runs in 'pending' or 'running' status can be cancelled; returns 400 otherwise.
Requires **flows.execute** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
Get a flow definition with all its steps.

Returns the full flow configuration including all steps ordered by position.
Returns 404 if the flow does not exist or belongs to another tenant.
Requires **flows.read** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

put.description:
Update a flow definition's metadata.

Supports partial updates -- only provided fields are modified.
Use this to rename, change description, toggle active status, or change execution method.
Requires **flows.write** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

422.description: Validation error — invalid request body or query parameters

delete.description:
Soft-delete a flow definition.

Sets is_active to False rather than permanently removing the record.
This preserves flow history and run data. Returns 204 No Content on success.
Requires **flows.write** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List all steps for a flow, ordered by position.

Returns the complete step configuration for each step in the flow.
Returns 404 if the parent flow does not exist or belongs to another tenant.
Requires **flows.read** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

post.description:
Add a step to a flow at the specified position.

The position must be unique within the flow; returns 400 if already occupied.
Step type determines execution behavior (message, tool, conversation, etc.).
Requires **flows.write** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

422.description: Validation error — invalid request body or query parameters

put.description:
Update a step's configuration.

Supports partial updates -- only provided fields are modified.
The step must belong to the specified flow; returns 404 if either is missing.
Requires **flows.write** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

422.description: Validation error — invalid request body or query parameters

delete.description:
Delete a step from a flow.

Permanently removes the step (hard delete). Returns 204 No Content on success.
Returns 404 if the flow or step does not exist.
Requires **flows.write** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

post.description:
Execute a flow asynchronously.

Validates the flow is active and has at least one step, then starts execution.
Returns 202 Accepted with a run_id for polling progress via GET /flows/runs/{run_id}.
Requires **flows.execute** permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List all Hub integrations with health status.

Returns integrations belonging to the caller's tenant and shared (NULL tenant_id)
integrations. Each entry includes type-specific fields (e.g. workspace_gid for
Asana, email for Gmail/Calendar). Filterable by active status.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
Get detailed information about a specific integration.

Includes type-specific data like workspace name (Asana) or email (Gmail/Calendar).
Returns 404 if the integration does not exist or belongs to another tenant.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
Check the health of a specific integration.

Performs an active health check against the integration provider and
returns the current status with any errors.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List available tools for a specific integration.

Returns the tool name, description, and input schema for each tool
exposed by the integration provider. Returns 404 if the integration
does not exist or belongs to another tenant.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

post.description:
Execute a tool on a specific integration.

Dispatches the tool execution to the correct provider service based on
the integration type. The tool_name must match one of the available tools
returned by the tools listing endpoint. Returns 400 if the integration
is inactive or its type does not support tool execution.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
List supported integration provider types.

Returns metadata about each provider type that can be configured in the Hub,
including whether it supports OAuth authentication.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

get.description:
Retrieve the complete Studio builder state for an agent.

Returns agent details, skills with provider metadata, knowledge documents,
sentinel profile assignments, and sandboxed tool mappings in a single call.
Requires the `agents.read` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

put.description:
Atomically save agent configuration from the Studio builder.

Applies all changes (core fields, skills, tool overrides, sentinel assignments)
within a single transaction; rolls back on any failure.
Requires the `agents.write` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

422.description: Validation error — invalid request body or query parameters

post.description:
Clone an existing agent and all its configuration.

Creates a full copy (contact, skills, tool assignments) as an inactive agent.
Knowledge documents and sentinel assignments are not cloned.
Requires the `agents.write` permission.

401.description: Authentication required — missing or invalid token/API key

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check X-RateLimit-Limit header

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Whether the flow should be active on creation

flow_type.title: Flow Type
flow_type.description: Flow type: notification, conversation, workflow, task

FlowCreateRequest.title: FlowCreateRequest
FlowCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a new flow definition.

FlowExecuteRequest.title: FlowExecuteRequest
FlowExecuteRequest.description: Request body for executing a flow.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: Flow run ID for status polling

node_count.title: Node Count
node_count.description: Number of steps in the flow

FlowUpdateRequest.title: FlowUpdateRequest
FlowUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating a flow definition.

is_system.title: Is System
is_system.description: Whether this is a system persona

message.title: Message
message.description: Rate limit message with quota details

RateLimitErrorDetail.title: RateLimitErrorDetail
RateLimitErrorDetail.description: Rate limit error body (matches middleware output).

is_long_running.title: Is Long Running
is_long_running.description: Whether this is a long-running command

is_system.title: Is System
is_system.description: Whether this is a system profile

is_default.title: Is Default
is_default.description: Whether this is the default profile

type.title: Type
type.description: Step type: notification, message, tool, conversation, Trigger, Message, Tool, Conversation

config_json.title: Config Json
config_json.description: Step configuration (schema depends on step type)

agent_id.title: Agent Id
agent_id.description: Agent ID override for this step

on_failure.title: On Failure
on_failure.description: Failure behavior: continue, skip, end (default: end)

on_success.title: On Success
on_success.description: Success behavior: continue, skip_to:{step}, end (default: continue)

StepCreateRequest.title: StepCreateRequest
StepCreateRequest.description: Request body for adding a step to a flow.

StepRunSummary.title: StepRunSummary
StepRunSummary.description: Summary of a step run within a flow run.

StepUpdateRequest.title: StepUpdateRequest
StepUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating a step.

is_default.title: Is Default
is_default.description: Whether this is the default agent

StudioAgentDetail.title: StudioAgentDetail
StudioAgentDetail.description: Agent details as seen in the Studio builder.

StudioAgentSaveData.title: StudioAgentSaveData
StudioAgentSaveData.description: Agent core field updates for builder save.

StudioBuilderDataResponse.title: StudioBuilderDataResponse
StudioBuilderDataResponse.description: Complete builder data for an agent in Studio.

original_agent_id.title: Original Agent Id
original_agent_id.description: ID of the agent that was cloned

new_agent_id.title: New Agent Id
new_agent_id.description: ID of the newly created agent clone

StudioSaveResponse.title: StudioSaveResponse
StudioSaveResponse.description: Result of an atomic builder save.

StudioSentinelSaveData.title: StudioSentinelSaveData
StudioSentinelSaveData.description: Sentinel assignment changes for builder save.

StudioSkillSaveItem.title: StudioSkillSaveItem
StudioSkillSaveItem.description: Skill update item for builder save.

is_enabled.title: Is Enabled
is_enabled.description: Whether the tool mapping is enabled

is_enabled.title: Is Enabled
is_enabled.description: Whether to enable this tool mapping

StudioToolOverrideItem.title: StudioToolOverrideItem
StudioToolOverrideItem.description: Tool mapping override for builder save.

is_system.title: Is System
is_system.description: Whether this is a system preset

tool_name.title: Tool Name
tool_name.description: Name of the tool to execute

ToolExecuteRequest.title: ToolExecuteRequest
ToolExecuteRequest.description: Request body for executing a tool on an integration.
